title: Two months, $2.6 billion: How NASA ETF turned SpaceX IPO access into a hot retail trade
summary_full: With Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO ahead, retail investors are rushing into space-themed ETFs including NASA which offers direct access to the rocket company.
summary_public: With Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO ahead, retail investors are rushing into space-themed ETFs including NASA which offers direct access to the rocket company.
